1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="" href="#6764b3b8e6da1">Seks råd for verving</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764b3b8e9b53">Hvem kan være medlem?</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764b3b8e
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="" href="#6787775b73327">Råd til deg som dekker krig og konflikt </a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6787775b74f90">Råd til redaksjoner som utsettes for trusle
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="" href="#6764a39a38d84">Ferie i tariffavtalene</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764a39a3b146">Tidspunkt for ferie</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764a39a3
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/norskjournalistlag/" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://no.linkedin.com/company/norsk-journalistlag" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="footer-title">Kontakt</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="active" href="#679b1f5ff1809">Trymprisen</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#679b1f6004c84">Årets klubbleiar</a></li> </ol> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/norskjournalistlag/" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://no.linkedin.com/company/norsk-journalistlag" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="footer-title">Kontakt</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="footer-title">Kontakt</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="footer-title">Kontakt</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="active" href="#6764b1facd296">Stup (Studie­permisjons­ordningene)</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764b1facfb16">NJs konferansestipender</a></li> <li><a cl
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="active" href="#67973e492bb0d">Hva er opphavsrett?</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#67973e49305c6">Hva innebærer det å ha opphavsrett?</a></li> <li><a class=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="active" href="#67877752c2e1e">Et godt arbeidsmiljø?</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#67877752c659c">Hvem har ansvar for hva?</a></li> <li><a class="" href="
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

Use only one <main> element per page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>På denne siden</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="subpage-nav"> <ol> <li><a class="" href="#6764a1ddabf61">Bygge og drifte klubb</a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764a1ddae16f">Styrearbeid </a></li> <li><a class="" href="#6764a1ddb0348">Fo
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nj.no/wp-content/uploads/sites/3/2024/12/Monstervedtekter-for-redaksjonsklubber_oppdatert-av-LS-7.-juni-2021.pdf" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Mønstervedtekter for klubber (pdf)
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/journalistlag" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/norskjournalistlag/" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://no.linkedin.com/company/norsk-journalistlag" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (53 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" class="modal__container" role="dialog"> <div class="container"> <header class="modal__header"> <a class="brand" href="/" title="Link til forsiden"><i class="icon"><svg height="1
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

python checker.py https://nj.no --max-pages 21 --format html
